page_classification.text_preview: TPS54719 2.95V 至 6V 输入、7A 同步降压转换器 1 特性 • 两个可在 7A 负载下获得高效率的 30mΩ（典型 值）MOSFET • 200kHz 至 2MHz 开关频率 • 在温度范围内提供 0.6V±1.5% 的电压基准 • 可调慢起动/时序/时序控制 • 欠压 (UV) 和过压 (OV) 电源正常输出 • 低运行和关断静态电流 • 安全启动至预偏置输出电压 • 逐周期电

component.description: 2.95V 至 6V 输入、7A 同步降压转换器

electrical_characteristics.parameter: Error amplifier transconductance (gm) during slow start
electrical_characteristics.raw_name: Error amplifier transconductance (gm) during slow start
electrical_characteristics.conditions: - 2 μA < I(COMP) < 2 μA, V(COMP) = 0.9 V, Vsense = 0.3 V

pin_definitions.description: Input supply voltage: 2.95 V to 6 V
Power Ground. This pin should be electrically connected directly to the power pad under the IC.
Analog Ground should be electrically connected to GND close to the device.
Inverting node of the transconductance (gm) error amplifier
Error amplifier output and input to the output switch current comparator. Connect frequency compensation components to this pin.
Slow start. An external capacitor connected to this pin sets the output voltage rise time. This pin can also be used for tracking.
The source of the internal high-side power MOSFET and drain of the internal low-side (synchronous) rectifier MOSFET.

A bootstrap capacitor is required between BOOT and PH. If the voltage on this capacitor is below the minimum required by the BOOT UVLO, the output is forced to switch off until the capacitor is refreshed.
An open-drain output. Asserts low if output voltage is low due to thermal shutdown, overcurrent, overvoltage/undervoltage, or EN shut down.
Enable pin, internal pullup current source. Pull below 1.18 V to disable. Float to enable. Can be used to set the on/off threshold (adjust UVLO) with two additional resistors.
GND pin should be connected to the exposed power pad for proper operation. This thermal pad should be connected to any internal PCB ground plane using multiple vias for good thermal performance.
